vocab.example: Could everyone keep their camera on during the discussion?
vocab.example_vi: Mọi người có thể bật camera trong lúc thảo luận không?

vocab.example: Please raise your hand if you want to speak next.
vocab.example_vi: Vui lòng giơ tay nếu bạn muốn phát biểu tiếp theo.

vocab.example: I will share the recording after the meeting.
vocab.example_vi: Tôi sẽ chia sẻ bản ghi sau cuộc họp.

vocab.example: Can someone take the minutes for this meeting?
vocab.example_vi: Ai đó có thể ghi biên bản cuộc họp này không?

vocab.example: Please be punctual — we start exactly at nine.
vocab.example_vi: Vui lòng đúng giờ — chúng ta bắt đầu đúng chín giờ.

vocab.example: Try to avoid distractions during the call.
vocab.example_vi: Hãy cố tránh sự phân tâm trong lúc gọi.

vocab.example: I already sent the meeting invite to everyone.
vocab.example_vi: Tôi đã gửi lời mời họp cho mọi người rồi.

vocab.example: Let's try to follow the agenda so we don't run late.
vocab.example_vi: Hãy cố bám sát chương trình họp để không bị trễ.

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: Good morning. I sent the meeting invite yesterday, thanks for being punctual.

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: No problem. Could everyone keep their camera on during the discussion?

lines.speaker: Linh
lines.text: Sure, that helps us stay focused and avoid distractions.

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: Great. Let's try to follow the agenda so we don't run late.

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: Sounds good. Please raise your hand if you want to speak next.

lines.speaker: Linh
lines.text: I will take the minutes for this meeting today.

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: Thank you, Linh. I'll also share the recording afterward.

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: Perfect. That way, anyone who missed it can catch up later.

questions.q: What does Hoa thank Minh for?
What does Minh ask everyone to do?

shadowing: Thanks for being punctual, everyone. Let's get started right away.
Could everyone keep their camera on during the discussion, please?
Let's try to follow the agenda so we don't run late.
Please raise your hand if you want to speak next.
I'll share the recording afterward, so nobody misses anything important.
